commands.review_summary:
The PR adds five OpenRouter image model IDs to the bundled OpenRouter image-generation provider metadata, extends its metadata test, and documents the curated list.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +6, Docs +7. Total +18 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a provider catalog feature PR, not a broken existing behavior report. Source inspection confirms current main lacks the proposed static IDs, and the live OpenRouter image catalog confirms the candidate models exist.

target.title: [codex] Add current OpenRouter image models
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #91504.

OpenRouter image generation currently exposes only a small static shortcut list, so users asking for broader OpenRouter image model support do not see current image-output models in OpenClaw's provider metadata or generated model catalog.

## Why This Change Was Made

OpenRouter's live `/api/v1/models` response currently advertises additional image-output models beyond the existing OpenClaw list, including:

- `google/gemini-3.1-flash-image`
- `google/gemini-3-pro-image`
- `google/gemini-2.5-flash-image`
- `openai/gpt-5-image`
- `openai/gpt-5-image-mini`

This PR adds those current model ids to the curated OpenRouter image-generation provider list while keeping existing preview model refs accepted for already configured users. It does not add dynamic catalog discovery; that can still be considered separately if maintainers want a live OpenRouter image catalog policy.

## User Impact

Users can now discover and configure more current OpenRouter image-output models for the `image_generate` tool without relying on undocumented override strings. Existing OpenRouter image configs continue to work because the previous preview ids remain in the list and the default is unchanged.

## Evidence

- Queried OpenRouter's live `https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/models` endpoint on 2026-06-28 and confirmed the added ids advertise `image` in `architecture.output_modalities`.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/openrouter/image-generation-provider.test.ts`
- `node node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/openrouter/image-generation-provider.ts extensions/openrouter/image-generation-provider.test.ts docs/providers/openrouter.md`
- `git diff --check`
- `corepack pnpm docs:list`

Proof gap: I did not run a paid live image generation request against OpenRouter; this PR is a catalog/metadata exposure update backed by OpenRouter's live model API plus focused request-shape/provider metadata tests.
target.author: aditya-vithaldas
